questionHtml: Calculate the standard Gibbs free energy change, ΔGΘ, in kJ, for this reaction at 1000 K. Use sections 1 and 2 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
ΔGΘ =«–RT ln Kc =» –8.31 J K–1 mol–1 × 1000 K × ln 280

OR

ΔGΘ = – 4.7 × 104 «J» ✔

 

«ΔGΘ =» – 47 «kJ» ✔

 

Award [2] for correct final answer.

meta.title: Calculate the standard Gibbs free energy change, ΔGΘ, in kJ, for this reaction at 1000 K. Use sections 1 and 2 of the data booklet.
